course_title: RADIOGRAPHIC ANATOMY OF THE DOG AND CAT
description: Normal radiographic anatomy of the dog and cat. This will include soft tissue structures as well as the skeletal system. Clinical case material to emphasize the need for a thorough knowledge of normal radiographic anatomy.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in Doctor of Veterinary Medicine with first year standing

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in Doctor of Veterinary Medicine with first year standing
